title: Reasonable Estimation
text: Sound travels at $$\pm 340$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$ (10**(2) m/s). Light travels much, much faster - it can circle the Earth about $$7$$ times per second.

title: Reasonable Estimation $$2$$
text: The speed of light is c ≈ $$3\times{10}^8$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$. The order of magnitude is $${10}^8$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$.
